title: Peaceful Recipes
description:
Recipes for everything that cannot be crafted.

Including items that cannot be obtained in peaceful
body:
This modification adds recipes for items and blocks that you cannot get in peaceful mode. There are also some recipes like the saddle, nametag and chainarmor that you can now craft. The mod is suitable for players who want to play in peaceful mode without the barrier to all items.

Info:
You can find all recipes in the gallery section or
by using the mod "Just Enough Items" by "mezz".
